ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fee" TEXT /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offering" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is being offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is offered (e.g., room number) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "class_time" TEXT /* Class time (e.g., 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offering_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student earning the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade is for */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was issued */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., final, midterm, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offering ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being rated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating provided by the student */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text review provided by the student */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material is for */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., syllabus, assignment, reading) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Actual material content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "material_size" TEXT /* Size of the material (e.g., in MB) */,
  "material_url" TEXT /* URL where the material can be accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "final_grade" REAL /* Final grade for the course (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
